text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, a wide variety of spectators have flocked
to Hanshin Racecourse to watch the Asahi Hai
Futurity Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Wow, it's already time for the racers who debuted
this year to start dipping their toes into G1 races,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
This is the race that will decide the junior
champion. Now, which one of these racers has
what it takes to secure their first G1 victory, I
wonder?

text_block_list.name: Girl with False Eyelashes
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, this place is like, mega crowded! It's like a
festival up here!

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text:
Hey, isn't this actually a pretty crazy race? It's
wild that Ines is competing in it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I didn't make it...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't able to be in the center of all this
excitement.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Palmer is recovering from her fracture, and
McQueen still hasn't made her debut yet.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I was the only one who could carry the Mejiro
name and step up to the challenge...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I was the most popular racer at first, and
everyone had big expectations for me... But I lost.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
If McQueen had made it in time, the result would
have been different for sure. She would have put
on a great performance worthy of the Mejiro
name!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I just can't seem to become a Mejiro Umamusume
like her...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Ryan! I discovered some truly scrumptious ice
cream. Let us share it together!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Bright?! When did you buy ice cream?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Eeek!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ah, Bright?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Splat!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Thank goodness I caught you in time. You're not
hurt, are you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm fine. But the ice cream... it spilled all over
your legs...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Don't worry about that! I'm just glad you're okay.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I guess all that training was good for
something—I've got some explosive acceleration,
at least!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: You have so much more than just that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I've been watching you since we were children.
You'd wake up at the crack of dawn and run laps
around the Mejiro gardens.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
You wanted to be the fastest, the strongest—so
you tried to put in more effort than anyone else.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I know, because you're the person I look up to the
most.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: ...Thanks, I needed to hear that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin is about to take on her first G1 race,
the Asahi Hai Futurity Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, look! It's amazing! They're airing a TV
special about the Asahi Hai!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
My sisters sent it to me! Look! You can even kind
of make me out in the background if you look
carefully!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Truthfully, Ines Fujin hasn't been able to practice
as much as her peers, since she struggles to find
time to train on her own.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even so, this race is merely a stepping stone
towards taking on the Derby. The primary goal is
to help her gain experience in G1 races, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For some, that first G1 race can be a
soul-crushing experience that opens their eyes to
the gap in skill compared to their opponents.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Trainer? Hellooo?
choice_data_list: Um, right now you should take it easy!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, right...
choice_data_list: Focus on the experience rather than winning!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ohhh! I see! Hm, hmm.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Ahaha! Say, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I can tell exactly what you're thinking! You worry
too much! Geez!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
If you keep making that face, you're gonna make
me anxious, too. Is that what you want? Me being
all shaky and nervous?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! So quit it with the worrying! C'mon, show
me that fearless smile of yours!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: You know, like, "This is my trainee, so she'll take first place for sure!"
choice_data_list: My trainee will take first place... for sure...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Good enough, I guess! Now I want you to
grab a seat in those stands and keep that smug
look on your face!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: It's time to show off my stuff!
